meta.title: Renulo — all your subscriptions in one place
meta.description: Track monthly and yearly subscriptions. See total spend and breakdown by category.

landing.title: All your subscriptions in one place
landing.subtitle: Netflix, YouTube, Gemini, internet and more — track spending, filter by category, and see your monthly total.
landing.feature1Desc: All subscriptions with amount, currency, and renewal date.
landing.feature2Desc: Monthly total and breakdown by streaming, AI, software, games, and more.
landing.feature3Desc: Your data is isolated per account. Only you can see your subscriptions.
landing.feature4Desc: UAH, USD, EUR — totals in your preferred currency.
landing.pricingNote: Free while we grow. Premium plans coming later.

auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.errorNetwork: Cannot reach Supabase. Check .env.local URL and anon key, then restart npm run dev.
auth.errorEmailRateLimitSignup: Registration failed. Too many confirmation emails were sent — please try again in about 60 minutes.
auth.errorEmailRateLimit: Too many email requests — please try again in about 60 minutes.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account.
auth.checkEmailHint: Check your spam folder if you don't see the email within a few minutes.
auth.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Please log in instead.
auth.googleNotEnabled: Google sign-in is not enabled. Enable Google in Supabase → Authentication → Providers.
auth.acceptTermsRequired: Please accept the Terms and Privacy Policy to continue.

dashboard.title: My subscriptions
dashboard.emptyDesc: Add your first subscription or pick a template below.
dashboard.limitWarning: Free plan: up to {limit} subscriptions. Upgrade coming soon.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteDesc: Permanently delete your account and all subscriptions. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteError: Could not delete account. Please try again or contact support.
